name: Spicy Pickles
description: Our flagship spicy variety brings the perfect balance of crunch and heat. Packed with a trio of spicy peppers - serrano, habanero, and fresno - these don't mess around. Each bite delivers bold flavor with a slow-building heat that keeps you coming back for more.

name: Semi Sour Pickles
description: For those who love a good brine without the fire. Crisp, tangy, and packed with classic deli flavor. Perfect for sandwich stacking or straight-from-the-jar snacking.

name: Spicy Dilly Beans
description: Crispy green beans brined to perfection with a spicy kick. These dilly beans are the ultimate snack - crunchy, tangy, and loaded with heat from our signature pepper trio. Great as a Bloody Mary garnish or straight from the jar.

name: Pickled Garlic
description: Whole cloves of garlic, brined with a touch of raw honey and our signature spicy pepper blend. Pop them like candy, toss them in pasta, or use them to elevate any dish. A garlic lover's dream.

name: Shoyu Garlic
tagline: East meets West in a jar
description: Japanese-inspired garlic with shoyu soy sauce and a hint of serrano heat. Umami-rich, slightly sweet, and incredibly addictive. Perfect for ramen, stir-fry, or as a sophisticated snack.

name: Manuka Garlic
description: Luxurious garlic elevated with Manuka honey and a warming blend of spices including cumin. The honey's natural sweetness balances the garlic's punch and our pepper trio's heat. A premium jar for the discerning palate.

name: Maple Garlic
description: Real maple syrup meets brined garlic in this sweet-heat masterpiece. The maple adds a rich, caramelized sweetness that pairs beautifully with the spicy pepper trio and warm spice blend. Absolutely irresistible.

name: Cowboy Candy
description: Candied jalapenos with honey, garlic, and a medley of herbs. Sweet, spicy, and dangerously addictive. Pile them on burgers, mix into cream cheese, or eat them straight. Once you start, you can't stop.

name: Escabeche
description: A traditional Mexican-style preparation with carrots and jalapenos in a tangy, oregano-seasoned brine. Perfect alongside tacos, tortas, or any dish that needs a bright, tangy crunch.

name: Brined Jalapenos
description: Crisp, tangy jalapeno slices with fresno pepper, garlic, and herbs. The perfect topping for nachos, pizza, sandwiches - you name it. Bold jalapeno flavor with a clean, sharp heat.

name: Brined Onions
description: Beautiful red onions brined in red vinegar with agave nectar and black peppercorn. Bright, tangy, and slightly sweet - the perfect topping for tacos, salads, burgers, and everything in between.

name: Brined Pineapple
tagline: Tropical tang with a spicy twist
description: Sweet pineapple chunks brined with serrano, honey, cinnamon, and clove. A tropical twist that's unlike anything you've tasted. Perfect on tacos al pastor, with cheese boards, or as a unique dessert topping.

name: Spicy Brined Okra
description: Whole okra pods brined with our spicy pepper trio for a Southern-inspired snack with serious kick. Crunchy, tangy, and hot - perfect for Bloody Marys, snack plates, or straight from the jar.

name: Spicy Brined Radish
description: Crisp radishes brined with habanero, serrano, and fresno peppers in a complex brine of agave and red wine vinegar. The radish's natural peppery bite amplified by our spiciest blend. For heat seekers only.

name: Spicy Brined Turnip
description: Earthy turnips transformed by our fiery pepper trio and a touch of agave sweetness. A Middle Eastern-inspired creation with a Big Sexy twist. Perfect alongside kebabs, falafel, or any Mediterranean spread.

name: Spicy Mixed Peppers
description: A fiery medley of serrano, fresno, and habanero peppers brined with garlic and dill. Our hottest jar - not for the faint of heart. Chop them into salsas, pile them on sandwiches, or dare your friends.

name: Spicy Purple Carrots
description: Gorgeous purple carrots brined with our signature spicy pepper blend and aromatic herbs. Beautiful enough for a charcuterie board, bold enough to hold their own. Crunchy, colorful, and packed with heat.

name: Brined Garlic 32oz
tagline: Double the garlic, double the love
description: Our beloved brined garlic in a full quart jar for true garlic enthusiasts. Same incredible recipe - whole cloves with raw honey and our spicy pepper trio - just more of it. Because you can never have too much garlic.
